name: Takedown request
about: You want your project removed from Droidify
labels: takedown-request

<!--
No lawyer. No formal process.
Tell us what to remove and we will do it within 48 hours. No questions asked.
-->

## Project name

## URL on Droidify where it appears

## Reason (optional — you do not have to explain)

## Permanent block?

- [ ] Yes — add to the blocklist so it never reappears even if picked up by a scraper later
- [ ] No — just remove it this once

---

> Droidify does not host your files. Every link points directly to your own servers.
> See [DMCA.md](../../DMCA.md) for the full policy.
